queries.question: Can you provide the artist name, date, city and country of each concert?
queries.sql: SELECT a.name, c.concert_date, cn.name, l.name FROM "Concert" c JOIN "Artist" a ON c.artist_name = a.name JOIN "City" l ON c.city_id = l.id JOIN "Country"  cn ON c.country_id = cn.id;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?concert_date ?name2 ?name3 WHERE {
  ?c a :Concert .
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?c p:artist_name ?artist_name_l .
  ?a p:name ?name_r .
  ?l a :City .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?cn a :Country .
  ?c p:hasCountry ?cn .
  ?a p:name ?name .
  ?c p:concert_date ?concert_date .
  ?cn p:name ?name2 .
  ?l p:name ?name3 .
  FILTER(STR(?artist_name_l) = STR(?name_r))
}

queries.question: Where did Dua Lipa's concert take place?
queries.sql: SELECT l.name FROM "Concert" c JOIN "Artist" a ON c.artist_name = a.name JOIN "City" l ON c.city_id = l.id WHERE a.name = 'Dua Lipa';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?c a :Concert .
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?c p:artist_name ?artist_name_l .
  ?a p:name ?name_r .
  ?l a :City .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?l p:name ?name .
  ?a p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?artist_name_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Dua Lipa")
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?name ?concert_date ?name2 ?name3 WHERE {
  ?c a :Concert .
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?c p:artist_name ?artist_name_l .
  ?a p:name ?name_r .
  ?l a :City .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?cn a :Country .
  ?c p:hasCountry ?cn .
  ?a p:name ?name .
  ?c p:concert_date ?concert_date .
  ?cn p:name ?name2 .
  ?l p:name ?name3 .
  FILTER(STR(?artist_name_l) = STR(?name_r))
} }
  component: { SELECT ?name ?concert_date ?name2 WHERE {
  ?c a :Concert .
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?c p:artist_name ?artist_name_l .
  ?a p:name ?name_r .
  ?l a :Country .
  ?c p:hasCountry ?l .
  ?a p:name ?name .
  ?c p:concert_date ?concert_date .
  ?l p:name ?name2 .
  FILTER(STR(?artist_name_l) = STR(?name_r))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?concert_date ?name2 WHERE {
  ?c a :Concert .
  ?a a :Artist .
  ?c p:artist_name ?artist_name_l .
  ?a p:name ?name_r .
  ?l a :City .
  ?c p:hasCity ?l .
  ?a p:name ?name .
  ?c p:concert_date ?concert_date .
  ?l p:name ?name2 .
  FILTER(STR(?artist_name_l) = STR(?name_r))
} }
}
